name: Astrana Health, Inc.
business: Astrana Health, Inc. provides healthcare services through three segments: Care Partners (risk-based capitation arrangements for health plan enrollees), Care Delivery (fee-for-service hospital and clinic services), and Care Enablement (management and administrative services to affiliated physician groups). The company serves HMO, Medicare, and Medi-Cal members, as well as health plans and physician organizations.

exposures.sentence: We have three reportable segments: Care Partners, Care Delivery, and Care Enablement.
Patient management platform, tradename/trademarks, and developed technology are amortized using the straight-line method.
